column2: Laporan Pilihanraya Umum Malaysia 1986, Suruhanjaya Pilihanraya Malaysia (EC), New Straits Times 5 August 1986, Analisis pilihanraya umum 1990 (by Zakry Abadi). For specific Parliamentarian Candidate background details, refer to 1986_Other_Sources_DUN_File

EC erroneously reported the total electorate for Bukit Chandan (Perak) as 19357. However, to achieve the reported EC electorate total of Perak (954180), the value of 19537 was used (as per Almanak keputusan pilihan raya umum : Parlimen dan Dewan Undangan Negeri 1959-1999 (by Anzagain)). EC erroneously reported the total electorate for DUN Jimah (Negeri Sembilan) as 9762. However, to achieve the reported EC electorate total of Negeri Sembilan (298660), the value of 9763 was used (as per Almanak keputusan pilihan raya umum : Parlimen dan Dewan Undangan Negeri 1959-1999 (by Anzagain)). EC placed a contradictory figure for the DAP candidate (DUN Batu Berendam, Melaka) where it placed 2970 in the main table of the full candidate list, while the actual figure is 2979 (as per Appendix L10 of the EC's Election Report). PAS created the Harakah Keadilan Rakyat Coalition, which includes PAS, PRM, Nasma, and SDP; however, the SDP of Perak and Johor chapters pulled out from the Coalition. Constituency Spelling follows the 1984 Peninsular Malaysia EC Map. There are significant gaps for sex categories and age of candidates.
